_comment: OpenAI Codex CLI MCP configuration. Path typically ~/.codex/config.json.

_notes.format_note: Codex CLI uses 'mcp_servers' (array) while Claude Code uses 'mcpServers' (object). Check your Codex version docs.
_notes.cwd_vs_--project: Codex supports cwd to anchor the command; alternatively use uv run with --project pointing to the absolute path.
